name: LeSourdsville Lake Amusement Park
owner: Edgar Streifthau (1922–1960) Howard Berni (1960–1990) Leisure International, Inc (1990–1996) Park River II (1996–2000) Jerry Couch (2000–2017) City of Monroe (2017-present)
description: LeSourdsville Lake Amusement Park was an amusement park located in Monroe, Ohio.  Founded by Edgar Streifthau, the park originally opened in 1922 as a family picnic destination with swimming amenities.  Throughout the 1940s, LeSourdsville Lake transformed into an amusement park with the addition of rides, attractions, and an arcade.
